name: the application build flow produces a backend, a frontend, and a database build unit (full-stack, not IaC-only)
command:
printf '%s' '{"complete":true,"answers":{"motivation":"revenue","availability_tolerance":"minutes","data_loss_tolerance":"minutes","budget_posture":"balanced","data_volume":"large","read_write_pattern":"balanced","data_cadence":"real-time","criticality":"mission-critical","data_sensitivity":"confidential","compliance_regime":"none","scale":"large","consistency_need":"strong","communication_style":"event-driven","integration_scope":"public","workload":"a full-stack SaaS application"}}' > p.json
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/architect-session.sh --vision "a full-stack SaaS application" --profile p.json --out-dir s --now 2026-06-08T00:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/codesign-build.sh --requirements s/technical-requirements.json --platform aws --json 2>/dev/null > plan.json
node -e 'const u=require("./plan.json").app_units.map(x=>x.unit);process.exit(u.includes("backend-api")&&u.includes("frontend")&&u.includes("database")?0:1)' && echo fullstack-app-units 1>&2
